mapper.select: SELECT s.*, c.name AS clazz_name FROM student s LEFT JOIN clazz c ON s.clazz_id = c.id ORDER BY s.create_time DESC
SELECT s.*, c.name AS clazz_name FROM student s LEFT JOIN clazz c ON s.clazz_id = c.id WHERE s.id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM student WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.update:
UPDATE student
name = #{name},
no = #{no},
gender = #{gender},
phone = #{phone},
id_card = #{idCard},
is_college = #{isCollege},
address = #{address},
degree = #{degree},
graduation_date = #{graduationDate},
clazz_id = #{clazzId},
violation_count = #{violationCount},
violation_score = #{violationScore},
update_time = #{updateTime},
WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE student SET violation_count = violation_count + 1, violation_score = violation_score + #{score}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
